title: Australian Prawn Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry dish featuring Australian prawns, rich and buttery flavors.
instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to turn pink.
Pour in coconut milk and fish stock, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until prawns are cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
